description: A near-verbatim screenshot of a web article/quote from 'The Harris Poll,' presented on a plain white background with only the polling firm's logo (a small black-and-coral geometric mark) and a hamburger menu icon at the top right; there is no added agency design, seal, photo, or styling. The body text reads: 'The skilled trades are highly respected: 91% of Americans agree that trade jobs are just as important to society as white-collar jobs. However, almost as many (86%) agree that skilled trade careers are overlooked in schools today. Since many schools fail to properly prepare students to enter the trades, companies often play a crucial role in providing hand-on skills training, paid internships, and scholarships.' Per the tweet, DOL shares it alongside the phrase 'Making America SKILLED AGAIN.'
notable_text: The Harris Poll / 91% of Americans agree that trade jobs are just as important to society as white-collar jobs / 86% agree that skilled trade careers are overlooked in schools today
